# PERF-134 positive: manual io.Read + io.Write loop instead of io.Copy
lang: go
file: PERF-134-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func ManualCopyHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	buf := make([]byte, 4096)
	for {
		n, err := r.Body.Read(buf)
		if err != nil {
			break
		}
		w.Write(buf[:n])
	}
}
